visual_description: A medium shot captures two men in what appears to be an office or a formal room. The man on the left, in profile, wears a light blue, short-sleeved collared shirt and a striped tie. He is looking towards the man on the right. The man on the right, who is the focus, is dressed in a white, short-sleeved collared shirt with a dark tie and a lanyard around his neck. He has a serious expression and looks slightly off-camera. In the background, a large window with blinds is visible. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner of the frame. The camera cuts to a close-up of the man in the white shirt. He is now looking down and to his left, his expression intense and focused.
